title: The Precipice
actors: Kenji Sugawara, Fujiko Yamamoto, Hitomi Nozoe
plot: Salarymen Uozo and his friend Kosaku plan to climb a mountain. A few days before they are due to start, Kosaku confesses that he has had a fling with a married woman, with whom he is now madly in love, but she has just dumped him....
